productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Mirar Brown Casual Shoes
description: These high-top rustic shoes from buckaroo blend vintage cowboy styling with a contemporary minimal twist. The outsole is referenced from the classic sport shoe and the upper form the work boot. Style this pair with denim or corduroy trousers and a casual check shirt. Alternatively, you can wear this with chinos and a crisp shirt. UpperHigh-top leather grain upper with strategically placed overlay on the heelStitch detailing on the midfootCentral lacing with metal eyeletsPadded tongueSoft insole for in-step comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heelStitch detailing on the seams of the toe boxMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with a curved midfoot and upraised heel Multidirectional lugs for good grip and tractionShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store under direct sunlight
